VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY.description: VAPID public key for Web Push notifications (generate with webpush-go or similar)

VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY.description: VAPID private key for Web Push notifications

VAPID_EMAIL.description: Contact email for Web Push — prefix with mailto: (e.g. mailto:you@example.com)

SITE_NAME.description: Display name for this community's instance (default: Go-Stop)
